_comment: SHA-256 allow-list of installed agent CLI binaries on this host. Consumed by scripts/eval/verify-trace.mjs via --expected-binary-hashes. Keys are the shim's basename-without-extension (see shimBinaryName in verify-trace.mjs). Binaries not installed on this host are intentionally omitted rather than listed with empty arrays (an empty array would reject every invocation). To rotate: rerun the hash computation against the resolved PL_REAL_BIN_<NAME> path (matching scripts/eval/harness.mjs resolveRealBinary) and append the new hash; keep the prior hash until all hosts are updated.
